findings.message: The new `APP_WIDGET_API_URL: "${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}"` interpolation in base.yml references a `${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}` variable that is not declared anywhere in `.env.example` (its FRAMEWORK-managed block declares only APP_ENVIRONMENT, APP_LOG_LEVEL, APP_SLO_*, APP_DATABASE_URL, GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD, APP_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL). With no `.env.example` declaration and no shell value set, Compose interpolates it to an empty string, so the app silently starts with a blank widget API URL. Declare `APP_WIDGET_API_URL=` in the `.env.example` FRAMEWORK block so the variable is documented and overridable.
findings.suggestion: Add an `APP_WIDGET_API_URL=` entry (with a sensible default or placeholder) inside the FRAMEWORK:BEGIN/END block of `.env.example` to match the new `${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}` interpolation.

raw_text: [{"path": "infra/compose/base.yml", "line": 11, "severity": "high", "message": "The new `APP_WIDGET_API_URL: \"${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}\"` interpolation in base.yml references a `${APP_WIDGET_API_URL}` variable that is not declared anywhere in `.env.example` (its FRAMEWORK-managed block declares only APP_ENVIRONMENT, APP_LOG_LEVEL, APP_SLO_*, APP_DATABASE_URL, GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD, APP_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL). With no `.env.example` declaration and no shell value set, Compose interpolates it to an empty string, so the app silently starts with a blank widget API URL.
